experience.description: Worked on client websites—QA, UI components, and web forms.
bullets: Conducted QA (regression) testing on 5+ client sites to meet industry best practices, reducing errors by 30%.
Engineered user-centric web forms with HTML, SQL and PHP, coordinating deadlines with a 4-person UX team.
Developed reusable UI, WCAG 2.1 compliant components using Bootstrap principles, reducing build time by 20%.

experience.description: Working in global asset mgmt (GAM) to help maintain applications and build new ones to streamline internal services.
bullets: Configured secure authentication on Kafka-based microservices using Kerberos (GSSAPI, keytabs, KDC), JAAS/SASL, and TLS one-way SSL, ensuring compliance with enterprise security standards.

Designed and maintained 2+ Avro schemas in Schema Registry and implemented encryption/decryption logic using an internal SDK for secure message serialization and deserialization, ensuring data integrity for PII data.
Implemented a Kafka producer batch job to process and publish up to 10000+ rows of SQL-based data in bulk using a transactional approach, with built-in auditing for data integrity and traceability.
Upgraded 2+ microservices to Java 25 and AWS SDK v2, reducing security vulnerabilities by 50% to improve performance and compatibility with modern libraries.
Set up CI/CD workflows using GitHub Actions to automate build and deployment workflows for DEV, QA and UAT environments.
Configured OpenShift (OCP) environments and deployed templates involving Vault secret decryption and file injection during runtime, improving deployment consistency and reducing manual setup.

experience.description: incoming summer 2026, working on the C1 Travel mobile app!
